name: Lime Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crust ingredients and stir well.
2. Press crumb mixture evenly over bottom and up sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 5 to 6 minutes, then let cool.
Filling Instructions:
1. Grate the lime rind (about 1 teaspoon).
2. Add softened cream cheese (24 ounces) to the bowl.
3. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar, beating well after each addition.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each.
5. Stir in grated lime rind, key lime juice, and vanilla extract.
6. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
7. Bake at 375 degrees for 45 minutes, or until set.
Final Instructions:
1. Combine sour cream (3 tablespoons) with additional sugar; stir well.
2. Spread evenly over cheesecake.
3. Bake at 500 degrees for 5 minutes.
4. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack and chill at least 8 hours.
5. To serve, carefully remove sides of springform pan. Garnish with strawberries and lime slices if desired.
Yield: one 9-inch cheesecake
